title: Taser 10: medical assessment and technical reports
body: "These reports have been written independently:   Technical testing report produced by PA Consulting User handling trials by College of Policing Medical assessment produced by the Scientific Advisory Committee on the Medical Implications of Less Lethal Weapons (SACMILL) Opinion report by Dstl (this is no longer Official – Sensitive) Letter report by Dstl    We are aware this publication may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing it so that we can fix these.  Read more about our accessible documents policy.  "
